sn.s: Necesito abrir una cuenta en el banco.
sn.e: I need to open a bank account.

sn.s: Hago una larga fila para esperar.
sn.e: I wait in a long line.

sn.s: "Buenos días. Quiero abrir una cuenta," digo.
sn.e: "Good morning. I'd like to open an account," I say.

sn.s: "¿Trae su cédula o pasaporte?" pregunta el cajero.
sn.e: "Do you have your ID or passport?" the teller asks.
"What are the other requirements?" I ask.

sn.s: "Necesita llenar este formulario y firmar aquí."
sn.e: "You need to fill out this form and sign here."
The process has a lot of paperwork.
"Where exactly do I sign?" I ask, carefully.
"Done. Your account will be active tomorrow."

sn.s: Los trámites en español ya no me asustan.
sn.e: Paperwork in Spanish no longer scares me.

sn.s: Preguntar con calma resuelve casi todo.
